title: AI Influence Digest insight scanner for Solar knowledge module
summary: Add a daily AI Influence Digest pipeline to the knowledge module: account config, public signal collection, scoring, GLM-5.1 analysis, digest rendering, Gmail preview/send, and wiki ingest dispatch.

nodes.title: Finalize requirements, account schema, and 151-account config.
nodes.goal: Create the account config format and accounts_extended.txt from the PRD. Confirm Tier 1 mandatory set, Tier 2 categories, enabled flag, and rotation metadata. Do not implement fetching yet.
acceptance: accounts_extended.txt exists
account parser-ready format is documented
Tier 1 mandatory and Tier 2 rotation categories are represented
handoff includes coverage count and open assumptions

nodes.title: Design and implement public-source collector with fallback and dedupe state.
nodes.goal: Implement candidate collection for DDG search, profile fallback, and RSS/public aggregation fallback. Add state and dedupe by tweet_url/content_hash/handle/date. Must support dry-run fixtures and not bypass login walls.
acceptance: dry-run scan plan includes all Tier 1 accounts
Tier 2 rotation simulation covers enabled accounts in 7 days
fallback order is DDG then profile then RSS
dedupe state is written without secrets

nodes.title: Implement scoring and GLM-5.1 JSON analysis with degraded fallback.
nodes.goal: Implement score_text and GLM-5.1 analyzer. Enforce the JSON schema from the contract. If GLM fails or returns invalid JSON, retry once then produce degraded local-scored digest.
acceptance: score_text positive and negative fixture tests pass
GLM output validates as JSON array
invalid GLM output triggers repair/degraded fallback
no Claude/Sonnet model is used for digest analysis

nodes.title: Implement digest artifacts, Gmail preview/send, and wiki ingest dispatch.
nodes.goal: Generate digest.json, digest.md, digest.html, and preview HTML. Add Gmail send path that degrades to preview. Write raw output under Knowledge/_raw/ai-influence-daily-digest/YYYY-MM-DD and trigger wiki ingest dispatch.
acceptance: digest.json/md/html are generated in temp dry-run
missing Gmail credentials returns warn and preview path
wiki ingest dispatch is created for digest raw dir
digest.md is suitable for knowledge extraction

nodes.title: Wire CLI, daily scheduler, status/doctor, tests, and final report.
nodes.goal: Expose solar-harness wiki ai-influence-digest run/status/doctor/send-test. Configure daily schedule only. Run tests and write final report with artifact paths, account coverage, GLM status, Gmail status, and wiki dispatch evidence.

architecture_policy.reason: P0 knowledge-module CLI wiring requires adding a namespaced solar-harness wiki subcommand only; implementation must keep rollback and tests.
architecture_policy.rollback: Remove the ai-influence-digest subcommand block from solar-harness.sh and keep scripts/tests as inert files.

acceptance: CLI run/status/doctor/send-test help works
scheduler defaults to once daily and can be disabled
test-ai-influence-digest.sh passes
final report includes account coverage, artifacts, Gmail status, wiki dispatch, and rollback

metadata.purpose: daily external AI influence scanning for Solar knowledge compounding
forbidden: make Gmail failure block knowledge ingest
schedule more frequently than daily by default
